creator: farid@hajji.name
text:
Created attachment 196628
kms-drm github issue 33

This is a patch against github revision cc04340 to fix a permissions problem affecting opencl on amdgpu and Xorg.

Without this patch, devel/clinfo doesn't even recognize my AMD RX580 GPU, with it, it displays a lot of informations about the card before dumping core (on 11.2-STABLE r337689), but at least it is making progress.

Patch source:

https://github.com/FreeBSDDesktop/kms-drm/issues/33
